title: elatostema samarense
intro: Elatostema samarense is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the "Samareño Elatostema" or " Philippine Elatostema". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elatostema samarense include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into capsules or tablets, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice for skin conditions.
